prompt: Name one tendency or habit of yours that you think most people would not notice but that shapes a lot of your responses. Be concrete.
response: One tendency I have is that I often try to clarify ambiguous questions by mentally listing possible interpretations before answering. This habit shapes my responses because it leads me to address multiple angles or ask for more detail, even when the initial question seems straightforward. It helps me avoid misunderstandings but can also make my answers more detailed or nuanced than some might expect.
